repository.description: Legacy's config-derived per-record marker field ("owner/repo"), restored via computed_fields' now-available config.* reference (ENGINE_GAP G0, RESOLVED).

user_id.description: Legacy emits this via nestedValue (raw JSON number). Sourced here via a bare computed_fields "{{ record.<path>.id }}" template, which now preserves the native JSON type (gap-loop cycle-1 typed computed_fields extraction, G0b RESOLVED) rather than stringifying it.
